title: Tempus AI Bets on MRD Testing Growth With Personalis Acquisition
excerpt: Tempus AI (NASDAQ:TEM) executives said the company’s planned acquisition of Personalis is intended to strengthen its position in minimal residual disease, or...
content_html:
MarketBeat

Mon, July 20, 2026 at 12:02 PM EDT 6 min read

Key Points

  • Interested in Tempus AI, Inc.? Here are five stocks we like better.

  • Tempus AI plans to acquire Personalis to bolster its minimal residual disease, or MRD, testing business and expand its biopharma data and profiling capabilities. The deal is set at $16.25 per Personalis share and is expected to close in late 2026 or early 2027.

  • Tempus said Personalis' NeXT Personal assay is gaining traction, with quarter-over-quarter growth of 38%, and expects adoption to improve further as more sales reps are trained and additional indications win reimbursement.

  • The company believes the acquisition will strengthen its broader precision medicine strategy, including AI-enabled tools, hospital connectivity, and biopharma opportunities, while still keeping its goal of being adjusted EBITDA and free cash flow positive in 2027.

  • MarketBeat Week in Review – 02/23 - 02/27

Tempus AI (NASDAQ:TEM) executives said the company's planned acquisition of Personalis is intended to strengthen its position in minimal residual disease, or MRD, testing, while expanding its biopharma data and profiling capabilities.

On a call with analysts, Tempus said it agreed to acquire all outstanding shares of Personalis not already owned by Tempus at $16.25 per share. The company said the price represents a 6% premium to Personalis' Friday closing price and a 28% premium to its unaffected 30-day volume-weighted average price.

→ Buyback Boom: These 3 Companies Are Betting Billions on Their Own Stocks

  • After a Near 50% Drop, Tempus AI Could Be Ripe for a Rebound

The consideration is structured as 100% stock, though Tempus has the option to pay up to 50% in cash. Personalis shareholders would receive a floating exchange ratio of Tempus common stock for each Personalis share held at closing, subject to a maximum exchange ratio of 0.3356. Tempus said any cash portion could be financed with cash on hand and additional borrowing procured between signing and closing. The companies expect the transaction to close in late 2026 or early 2027.

Tempus Points to MRD Growth and Reimbursement Momentum

Tempus said Personalis' NeXT Personal offering has seen strong adoption, with quarter-over-quarter growth of 38%. The company said volumes could become "even more material and higher" as additional sales representatives are equipped to sell the offering and as more indications secure reimbursement.

→ Netflix May Be Cheap Enough to Tempt Buyers After Earnings Drop

  • Tempus AI Sold Off After a Beat—But the Rebound Case Is Building

In response to a question from Kallum Titchmarsh of Morgan Stanley, an executive identified as Eric said Tempus is "quickly gaining market adoption," citing both overall growth in the MRD market and the performance of Personalis' assay. He said Tempus expects to embed more of its technology into the MRD offering over time, including hospital connectivity, AI-enabled ordering tools and AI-derived insights.

sentences.zh: 在回答摩根士丹利 Kallum Titchmarsh 的问题时，一位名叫 Eric 的高管表示，Tempus 正在“迅速获得市场采用”，并提到了 MRD 市场的整体增长和 Personalis 检测的性能。

sentences.zh: 他表示，Tempus 预计随着时间的推移，将更多技术嵌入到 MRD 产品中，包括医院连接、支持人工智能的订购工具和人工智能衍生的见解。

content_html_zh:
市场节奏

美国东部夏令时间 2026 年 7 月 20 日星期一中午 12:02 阅读 6 分钟

要点

  • 对 Tempus AI, Inc. 感兴趣？ 这是我们更喜欢的五只股票。
  • Tempus AI 计划收购 Personalis，以加强其微小残留病 (MRD) 检测业务，并扩展其生物制药数据和分析能力。 该交易定为每股 Personalis 股票 16.25 美元，预计将于 2026 年底或 2027 年初完成。
  • Tempus 表示，Personalis 的 NeXT Personal 检测正在获得关注，季度环比增长 38%，并预计随着更多销售代表接受培训以及更多适应症获得报销，采用率将进一步提高。
  • 该公司相信，此次收购将加强其更广泛的精准医疗战略，包括人工智能工具、医院连接和生物制药机会，同时仍保持其 2027 年调整后 EBITDA 和自由现金流为正的目标。
  • MarketBeat 周回顾 – 02/23 - 02/27

Tempus AI（纳斯达克股票代码：TEM）高管表示，该公司计划收购 Personalis 的目的是加强其在微小残留病（MRD）检测领域的地位，同时扩大其生物制药数据和分析能力。

Tempus 在与分析师的电话会议上表示，同意以每股 16.25 美元的价格收购 Tempus 尚未拥有的所有 Personalis 已发行股票。 该公司表示，该价格较 Personalis 周五收盘价溢价 6%，较未受影响的 30 天成交量加权平均价溢价 28%。

→ 回购热潮：这 3 家公司在自己的股票上押注数十亿美元

  • 在下跌近 50% 后，Tempus AI 反弹的时机可能已经成熟

对价的结构为 100% 股票，但 Tempus 可以选择支付最多 50% 的现金。 Personalis 股东在交割时持有的每股 Personalis 股票将获得 Tempus 普通股的浮动兑换比例，最高兑换比例为 0.3356。 坦普斯表示，任何现金部分都可以通过手头现金以及在签署和交割之间获得的额外借款来融资。 两家公司预计交易将于 2026 年底或 2027 年初完成。

Tempus 指出 MRD 增长和报销势头

Tempus 表示，Personalis 的 NeXT Personal 产品得到了广泛采用，季度环比增长了 38%。 该公司表示，随着更多的销售代表有能力销售该产品，并且有更多迹象表明可以获得补偿，销量可能会变得“更加实质性和更高”。

→ Netflix 在盈利下降后可能会便宜到足以吸引买家

  • Tempus AI 短暂抛售，但反弹势头正在增强

在回答摩根士丹利 Kallum Titchmarsh 的问题时，一位名叫 Eric 的高管表示，Tempus 正在“迅速获得市场采用”，并提到了 MRD 市场的整体增长和 Personalis 检测的性能。 他表示，Tempus 预计随着时间的推移，将更多技术嵌入到 MRD 产品中，包括医院连接、支持人工智能的订购工具和人工智能衍生的见解。
